title: Quantum Tycoon, an educational video game for discovering quantum computing
why:
- Quantum Tycoon is a new educational app that introduces quantum computing through interactive gameplay.
- The app was developed by students and researchers at the University of Barcelona’s Faculty of Physics, ICCUB, and IN2UB.
- Players manage a quantum computer company and use real quantum algorithms, such as Grover’s algorithm, within a simulation environment.
- The game aims to make quantum science and technology accessible to a wide audience by blending entertainment with scientific rigor.
- Quantum Tycoon is available for free on Google Play.
